reviews.comment:
Paso obligado de carga de combustible en la ruta tres. Buen precio patagónico. Larga cola de espera.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for fuel on Route 3. Good Patagonian prices. Long queue.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service and excellent toilets

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención!
Para los diesel si cargan aca saltan Trelew y llegan a Garayalde; ahorrando el tiempo de espera y cola. Para los mas osados pueden llegar a comodoro rivadavia, ojo si les toca viento del oeste.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent attention!
For the diesels, if they load here, they skip Trelew and arrive at Garayalde; saving waiting and queuing time. For the most daring, you can reach Comodoro Rivadavia, be careful if you get a west wind.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRLVBTV1NBEAE
